themes: Long wait times across a heavily Manager-skewed backlog signal a need to prioritize scalable, self-serve workflows and reporting tools that reduce daily friction for multi-location managers.

Several accounts appear multiple times with different contacts and growing wait times, suggesting that unresolved product pain points are spreading within the same organizations and need coordinated, account-level responses.

Diverse verticals — spanning fitness, hospitality, real estate, food service, and travel — share common requests around location-level reporting, review management, and operational efficiency, pointing to an opportunity for more configurable, role-based product experiences.
